title: Unauthorized error when creating credentials via API
symptom: When attempting to create credentials through the n8n API, the response returns 'Unauthorized'. This indicates an issue with the authentication process.
applies_when: Using n8n API to create credentials
not_this_if: Using the correct authorization header format
root_cause: The error occurs because the authorization header is incorrectly named or formatted. The API expects a specific format for the authorization token, and any deviation from this will result in an unauthorized error.
fix_steps: Check the authorization header in your API request.
Ensure it is formatted as 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY'.
Correct any discrepancies and retry the API call.
agent_instruction: Verify and correct the authorization header format in your API request.
